\section{Geometric quantities for the FLRW metric}

The metric is given by
\[
ds^2 = -c^2 dt^2 + a(t)^2 (dx^2+dy^2+dz^2) .
\]

\subsection{Metric tensor $g_{\mu\nu}$}
\begin{align} g_{\mu\nu}= 
\left[\begin{matrix}- c^{2} & 0 & 0 & 0\\0 & a^{2}{\left(t \right)} & 0 & 0\\0 & 0 & a^{2}{\left(t \right)} & 0\\0 & 0 & 0 & a^{2}{\left(t \right)}\end{matrix}\right]
\end{align}

\subsection{Christoffel symbols $\Gamma^{\mu}_{\nu\rho}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
\Gamma^{t}_{xx} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
\Gamma^{t}_{yy} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
\Gamma^{t}_{zz} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
\Gamma^{x}_{tx} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
\Gamma^{x}_{xt} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
\Gamma^{y}_{ty} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
\Gamma^{y}_{yt} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
\Gamma^{z}_{tz} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
\Gamma^{z}_{zt} &= \frac{\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
\end{align}

\subsection{Riemann curvature tensor $R^{\mu}_{\ \nu\rho\sigma}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
R^{t}_{xtx} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{t}_{xxt} &= - \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{t}_{yty} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{t}_{yyt} &= - \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{t}_{ztz} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{t}_{zzt} &= - \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{x}_{ttx} &= \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
R^{x}_{txt} &= - \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
R^{x}_{yxy} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{x}_{yyx} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{x}_{zxz} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{x}_{zzx} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{y}_{tty} &= \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
R^{y}_{tyt} &= - \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
R^{y}_{xxy} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{y}_{xyx} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{y}_{zyz} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{y}_{zzy} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{z}_{ttz} &= \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
R^{z}_{tzt} &= - \frac{\frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
R^{z}_{xxz} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{z}_{xzx} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{z}_{yyz} &= - \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R^{z}_{yzy} &= \frac{\left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
\end{align*}

\subsection{Ricci tensor $R_{\mu\nu}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
R_{tt} &= - \frac{3 \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)}}{a{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
R_{xx} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + 2 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R_{yy} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + 2 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
R_{zz} &= \frac{a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + 2 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
\end{align}

\subsection{Ricci scalar $R$}
\begin{align}
\frac{6 \left(a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} + \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}\right)}{c^{2} a^{2}{\left(t \right)}}
\end{align}

\subsection{Einstein tensor $G_{\mu\nu}$ (non-zero)}
\begin{align}
G_{tt} &= \frac{3.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{a^{2}{\left(t \right)}} \\ 
G_{xx} &= \frac{- 2.0 a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} - 1.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
G_{yy} &= \frac{- 2.0 a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} - 1.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
G_{zz} &= \frac{- 2.0 a{\left(t \right)} \frac{d^{2}}{d t^{2}} a{\left(t \right)} - 1.0 \left(\frac{d}{d t} a{\left(t \right)}\right)^{2}}{c^{2}} \\ 
\end{align}
